name: sap-agentic-harness
description: Harness-portable lite edition of SuperClaude for SAP — module knowledge packs (14+BC), industries, countries, ABAP conventions/templates, 26 personas (on-demand via INDEX selector), 11 single-agent procedures with human approval + fresh-context review gates. SAP connectivity via the bundled ABAP ADT MCP server (register separately: see adapters/codex/README.md).

interface.shortDescription: SAP ABAP development and consulting — knowledge, personas, gated procedures
